header.title: Pettner
header.firebaseErrorDescription: Firebase is not configured. Authentication will not work. Please ensure you have correctly entered your Firebase project information in the `.env` file.

loginPage.title: Login
loginPage.description: Enter your email and password to log in to your account.
loginPage.firebaseErrorDescription: Firebase is not configured correctly. Please check your .env file.
loginPage.loginFailedDescription: Please check your email or password.
loginPage.loginFailedNotAllowed: Email/Password login is not enabled in the Firebase project. Please enable it in the Firebase console.
loginPage.loginFailedInvalid: The email or password is incorrect.
loginPage.googleLoginFailed: An error occurred during Google sign-in. Please try again later.

signupPage.title: Sign Up
signupPage.description: Enter your information below to create an account.
signupPage.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters.
signupPage.emailInUse: This email is already in use.
signupPage.operationNotAllowed: Email/Password login is not enabled in the Firebase project. Please enable it in the Firebase console.

accountPage.title: My Account
accountPage.myPetsDescription: Register your pet and use personalized services. (Subscription feature coming soon)

historyPage.title: My Analysis History
historyPage.fetchError: An error occurred while fetching analysis history.
historyPage.noHistoryDescription: Go to the home page to analyze a new product.

homePage.analysisCompleteDescription: The result has been saved to 'My Analysis History'.
homePage.analysisFailedDescriptionUnknown: An unknown error occurred. Please try again.
homePage.fileReadFailedDescription: An error occurred while reading the image. Please select a different file.
homePage.aiError: An error occurred during analysis. Please check your input and try again.
homePage.aiInputError: Please provide either the ingredient text or an image for analysis.

scannerHome.title: Veterinary Nutrition Ingredient Analysis
scannerHome.descriptionV2:
Directly input product information or take a photo of the ingredients.
Our veterinary nutrition science provides an analysis based on scientific evidence.
scannerHome.ingredientsPlaceholder: Copy and paste the full list of ingredients here...
scannerHome.ingredientsDescription: * Please copy the 'Ingredients' and 'Guaranteed Analysis' exactly as they appear.
scannerHome.inputRequired: Please enter ingredient text or upload a photo.
scannerHome.healthConditionsPlaceholder: e.g., kidney disease, skin allergies. Enter multiple conditions separated by commas.
scannerHome.imageDescription: * For more accurate analysis, please attach a clear photo of the ingredient list.
scannerHome.instruction: * Please take a clear picture of the 'Ingredients' and 'Guaranteed Analysis'.
scannerHome.imagePrompt:
Click or drag file to this area to upload.
(Product name, ingredients, guaranteed analysis)

analysisLoading.title: Analyzing Ingredients...
analysisLoading.description:
We are carefully examining the food ingredients
based on the latest scientific papers and nutritional guidelines.

analysisResult.topIngredientsDesc: The first 5 ingredients that make up the largest portion of the product.
analysisResult.ingredientAnalysisDescription: Here is a list of key ingredients from the analysis.
analysisResult.noData: Not enough information to display a chart.
analysisResult.disclaimer: Disclaimer: This analysis is for informational purposes and cannot replace professional medical advice from a veterinarian. If your pet has any health issues, please consult a professional veterinarian.
analysisResult.affiliateDisclaimer: When you purchase a product through these links, Pettner may earn a commission as part of our affiliate activities.

safetyRating.greenDesc: Generally considered safe based on the provided ingredients.
safetyRating.yellowDesc: Caution is advised. Contains ingredients that may not be suitable for all pets.
safetyRating.redDesc: Warning. Contains potentially harmful ingredients or is unsuitable for the pet's condition.

tooltips.protein: An essential nutrient that builds and maintains body tissues like muscles, skin, and fur. 'Crude protein' includes non-protein nitrogen compounds in addition to pure protein.
tooltips.fat: Used as an energy source and is crucial for absorbing fat-soluble vitamins and maintaining cell function. It also serves as a source of essential fatty acids like Omega-3 and Omega-6.
tooltips.fiber: Indigestible carbohydrates that promote intestinal movement and aid in bowel function. Adequate crude fiber has a positive effect on gut health and constipation prevention.
tooltips.ash: Refers to the total amount of minerals remaining after the feed is incinerated. These are inorganic components essential for bone and body functions, such as calcium, phosphorus, and magnesium.
tooltips.moisture: The amount of water contained in the feed. A higher moisture content helps with hydration, while it is also a crucial figure to consider when calculating nutrient content on a dry matter (DM) basis.

firebaseError.title: Firebase Configuration Required
firebaseError.description: The application is not connected to a Firebase project.
firebaseError.instructions: To connect to your Firebase project, you need to set up your environment variables. Please copy the web app configuration from your Firebase project settings in the Firebase Console and paste it into a .env file in the root of your project.
firebaseError.restart: After editing the file, you need to restart the development server for the changes to take effect.
